description: Deterministic follow-up decision trees per chief complaint. Presented one question at a time in a conversational tone; a question is skipped when an earlier answer already implies it. The 'default' tree handles any complaint without a dedicated tree so every patient gets a real intake conversation.

onset.question: I'm sorry you're dealing with chest pain. When did it start — just now, earlier today, or over the last few days?

character.question: Thanks. How would you describe it — a pressure or tightness, a sharp stab, or a burning feeling?

radiation.question: Does the pain spread anywhere — to your arm, jaw, neck, or back — or does it stay in one spot?

associated.question: Got it. Along with the chest pain, are you having any shortness of breath, sweating, or nausea right now?

exertion.question: Last question — does it get worse when you move or exert yourself, or is it about the same at rest?

onset.question: Sorry to hear about the headache. Did it come on suddenly, or has it built up gradually?

severity.question: How bad is it compared to headaches you've had before — similar, worse, or the worst you've ever had?

associated.question: Are you noticing anything along with it — a stiff neck, vomiting, fever, or changes in your vision?

duration.question: And how long has this one been going on — hours, or days?
Let's get you sorted. How long have you had the fever — since today, or a few days now?

temperature.question: Have you been able to measure it? Roughly how high has it gone?

associated.question: Along with the fever, any chills, body ache, rash, or trouble keeping fluids down?

hydration.question: Last one — are you drinking water normally and urinating as usual?

location.question: Sorry you're in pain. Where in your belly is it — upper, lower, right side, left side, or all over?

severity.question: How intense is it — a dull ache you can work through, or severe enough that it stops you?

associated.question: Any vomiting, blood in your stool, or a fever along with it?

eating.question: And is it connected to eating — worse after meals, or the same either way?

duration.question: Thanks for telling me. How long has this been bothering you — hours, days, or longer?

severity.question: How much is it affecting you day to day — mild and manageable, or bad enough to stop your normal routine?

associated.question: Is anything else going on alongside it — fever, dizziness, breathlessness, or anything that feels new or unusual?

history.question: Last one — any ongoing conditions or regular medications the doctor should know about?
